```{r}
library(lineqGPR)
library(stringr)
library(reshape2)
library(tidyr)
library(beepr)      
#library(rprojroot)
#root <- has_file(".Bayesian-Workflow-root")$make_fix_file()
library(tidyverse)
library(tictoc)
mytoc <- \() {
  toc(func.toc = \(tic, toc, msg) {
    sprintf("%s took %s sec", msg, as.character(signif(toc - tic, 2)))
  })}
library(cmdstanr)
# CmdStanR output directory makes Quarto cache to work
#dir.create(root("stan", "stan_output"), showWarnings = FALSE)
#options(cmdstanr_output_dir = root("stan", "stan_output"))
library(posterior)
options(pillar.neg = FALSE,
        pillar.subtle = FALSE,
        pillar.sigfig = 2)
library(tinytable)
options(tinytable_format_num_fmt = "significant_cell",
        tinytable_format_digits = 2,
        tinytable_tt_digits = 2)
library(loo)
library(bayesplot)
theme_set(bayesplot::theme_default(base_family = "sans"))
library(ggdist)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)
library(RColorBrewer)
set1 <- brewer.pal(7, "Set1")
Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "en_GB.utf8")

library(dplyr)
library(rstan)
library(ggplot2)

rstan_options(auto_write = TRUE)
options(mc.cores = parallel::detectCores())

set.seed(123)
```


```{r}
#data <- read_csv( "C:/Users/zubareva/OneDrive - Tilburg University/Desktop/code/phd/data examples/child IQ/data/kid_iq.csv")
data <- read_csv( "C:/Users/margo/OneDrive/Рабочий стол/phd code/data examples/child IQ/data/kid_iq.csv")
names(data)[names(data)=="...1"] <- "datapoint"

min_IQ = 0
max_IQ = 160
range01 <- function(x, ...){(x - min_IQ) / (max_IQ - min_IQ)}
data$kid_score <- range01(data$kid_score)
data$mom_iq <- range01(data$mom_iq)
data$mom_hs <- as.factor(data$mom_hs)

p1<- ggplot(data, aes(mom_iq, kid_score, color = factor(mom_hs))) + geom_point() + geom_smooth()
p1
p2<- ggplot(data, aes(mom_iq, kid_score, color = factor(mom_hs))) + geom_point() + geom_smooth(method = "lm")
p2
ggsave("loess.png", p1, width = 10, height = 6,dpi = 180)
ggsave("lm.png", p2, width = 10, height = 6,dpi = 180)

data_no_hs <-  data[data$mom_hs==0,]
data_hs<- data[data$mom_hs==1,]

# _____ plots____

clr_bg     <- "#FFFFFF" #"#0f1117"
clr_panel  <- "#FFFFFF"#"#181b24"
clr_grid   <- "#262b38"
clr_text   <- "#c8cfe0"
clr_sub    <- "#6b7694"
clr_line   <- "#7eb8f7"
clr_accent <- "#f97316"
clr_pos    <- "#4ade80"
clr_mid    <- "#f0c040"
clr_neg    <- "#fb7185"

 
theme_mood <- function(base_size = 12) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = clr_bg,    color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = clr_panel, color = NA),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = clr_grid, linewidth = .3),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.text        = element_text(color = clr_sub,  size = rel(.85)),
      axis.title       = element_text(color = clr_text, size = rel(.9)),
      plot.title       = element_text(color = clr_text, size = rel(1.15),
                                      face = "bold", margin = margin(b = 3)),
      plot.subtitle    = element_text(color = clr_sub,  size = rel(.82),
                                      margin = margin(b = 8)),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = clr_panel, color = NA),
      legend.text       = element_text(color = clr_sub),
      legend.title      = element_text(color = clr_text),
      strip.text        = element_text(color = clr_text, face = "bold"),
      strip.background  = element_rect(fill = clr_grid,  color = NA),
      plot.margin       = margin(12, 14, 10, 14)
    )
}
theme_set(theme_mood())
```

### NO HS

# unconstrained
```{r}
x <- data_no_hs$mom_iq
y <- data_no_hs$kid_score
model_no_hs_u <- create(
  class = "lineqGP",
  x = x,
  y = y,
  constrType = c("boundedness")
)
model_no_hs_u$m = 100
model_no_hs_u$varnoise <- 1e-2
model_no_hs_u$bounds <- c(-10,10)
model_no_hs_u <- augment(model_no_hs_u)

sim.model_no_hs_u <- simulate(model_no_hs_u,
                      xtest = x,
                      nsim = 1e2,
                      seed = 1)
beep()
ysim <- sim.model_no_hs_u$ysim
qtls <- apply(ysim, 1, quantile, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))

pred_no_hs_u <- data.frame(
  da_x = x,
  da_y = y,
  gp = apply(ysim, 1, mean)
)

ggplot() + geom_point(data = pred_no_hs_u, aes(x = da_x, y = da_y)) + geom_line(data = pred_no_hs_u, aes(x = da_x, y = gp), color = "red") +     geom_ribbon(aes(x = x, ymin = qtls[1, ], ymax = qtls[2, ]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
```

# monotonic bounded

```{r}
x <- data_no_hs$mom_iq
y <- data_no_hs$kid_score
model_no_hs <- create(
  class = "lineqGP",
  x = x,
  y = y,
  constrType = c("boundedness", "monotonicity"),
  m = 30
)
#model_no_hs$m <- 100
model_no_hs$bounds[1, ] <- c(0, 1)
model_no_hs$varnoise <- 1e-2

sim.model_no_hs <- simulate(model_no_hs,
                      xtest = x,
                      nsim = 1e2,
                      seed = 1)
beep()

ysim <- sim.model_no_hs$ysim
qtls <- apply(ysim, 1, quantile, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))

pred_no_hs <- data.frame(
  da_x = x,
  da_y = y,
  gp = apply(ysim, 1, mean)
)

ggplot() + geom_point(data = pred_no_hs, aes(x = da_x, y = da_y)) + geom_line(data = pred_no_hs, aes(x = da_x, y = gp), color = "red") +     geom_ribbon(aes(x = x, ymin = qtls[1, ], ymax = qtls[2, ]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
```

# HS

# unconstrained
```{r}
x <- data_hs$mom_iq
y <- data_hs$kid_score
model_hs_u <- create(
  class = "lineqGP",
  x = x,
  y = y,
  constrType = c("boundedness"),
  m = 30
)
#model_hs_u$m <- 100
model_hs_u$varnoise <- 1e-2
model_hs_u$bounds <- c(-10,10)
model_hs_u <- augment(model_hs_u)

sim.model_hs_u <- simulate(model_hs_u,
                      xtest = x,
                      nsim = 1e2,
                      seed = 1)
beep()

ysim <- sim.model_hs_u$ysim
qtls <- apply(ysim, 1, quantile, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))

pred_hs_u <- data.frame(
  da_x = x,
  da_y = y,
  gp = apply(ysim, 1, mean)
)
ggplot(pred_hs_u, aes(da_x, da_y)) + geom_point() + geom_line(aes(da_x, gp), color = "red")+     geom_ribbon(aes(x = x, ymin = qtls[1, ], ymax = qtls[2, ]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
```

# monotonic bounded 
```{r}
x <- data_hs$mom_iq
y <- data_hs$kid_score
model <- create(
  class = "lineqGP",
  x = x,
  y = y,
  constrType = c("boundedness", "monotonicity"),
  m = 30
)
#model$m <- 100
model$bounds[1, ] <- c(0, 1)
model$varnoise <- 1e-2

sim.model <- simulate(model,
                      xtest = x,
                      nsim = 1e2,
                      seed = 1)
beep()

ysim <- sim.model$ysim
qtls <- apply(ysim, 1, quantile, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))

pred_hs <- data.frame(
  da_x = x,
  da_y = y,
  gp = apply(ysim, 1, mean)
)
ggplot(pred_hs, aes(da_x, da_y)) + geom_point() + geom_line(aes(da_x, gp), color = "red")+     geom_ribbon(aes(x = x, ymin = qtls[1, ], ymax = qtls[2, ]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
```

```{r}
points <- geom_point(data = data, aes(x = (mom_iq), y = (kid_score), color = factor(mom_hs)))

line_hs<- geom_line(data = pred_hs_u, aes(x = da_x, y = gp), color = "darkslategray4", linewidth = 1)

line_no_hs <- geom_line(data = pred_no_hs, aes(x = da_x, y = gp), color = "indianred3", linewidth = 1)

qtls_hs <- apply(sim.model$ysim, 1, quantile, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
qtls_no_hs <- apply(sim.model_no_hs$ysim, 1, quantile, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))

ci_hs <- geom_ribbon(aes(x = data_hs$mom_iq, ymin = qtls_hs[1, ], ymax = qtls_hs[2, ]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
  
ci_no_hs <- geom_ribbon(aes(x = data_no_hs$mom_iq, ymin = qtls_no_hs[1, ], ymax = qtls_no_hs[2, ]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)

p1 <- ggplot()  + points  + ci_hs + ci_no_hs + line_hs + line_no_hs
p1
ggsave("constrained_gps.png", p1, width = 10, height = 6,dpi = 180)
```
## PREDICTION
# NO HS 
```{r}
x <- data_no_hs$mom_iq
y <- data_no_hs$kid_score
x_test_no_hs <- append(seq(0, 0.45, by = 0.05), append(x, seq(0.8, 1, by = 0.05)))
model_no_hs <- create(
  class = "lineqGP",
  x = x,
  y = y,
  constrType = c("boundedness", "monotonicity"),
  m = 30
)
model_no_hs$bounds[1, ] <- c(0, 1)
model_no_hs$varnoise <- 1e-2

sim.model_no_hs <- simulate(model_no_hs,
                            xtest = x_test_no_hs,
                            nsim = 1e2,
                            seed = 1)
beep()

ysim <- sim.model_no_hs$ysim
qtls_pred_no_hs <- apply(ysim, 1, quantile, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))

points <- data.frame(x = (x), y = (y))
ymean = apply(ysim, 1, mean)
lines_pred_no_hs <- data.frame(x = x_test_no_hs, y = ymean)

ggplot() + geom_point(data = points, aes(x = x, y = y)) + geom_line(data = lines_pred_no_hs, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "red") + geom_ribbon(aes(x = x_test_no_hs, ymin = qtls_pred_no_hs[1, ], ymax = qtls_pred_no_hs[2, ]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
```

## HS
# monotonic bounded 
```{r}
x <- data_hs$mom_iq
y <- data_hs$kid_score
x_test_hs <- append(seq(0, 0.40, by = 0.05),append(x, seq(0.8, 1, by = 0.05)))
model <- lineqGPR::create(
  class = "lineqGP",
  x = x,
  y = y,
  constrType = c("boundedness", "monotonicity"),
  m = 30
)

model$bounds[1, ] <- c(0, 1)
model$varnoise <- 1e-2

sim.model <- simulate(model,
                      xtest = x_test_hs,
                      nsim = 1e2,
                      seed = 1)
beep()

ysim <- sim.model$ysim
qtls_pred_hs <- apply(ysim, 1, quantile, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))

points<- data.frame(x = (x),
  y = (y))
ymean = apply(ysim, 1, mean)
lines_pred_hs <- data.frame(x = x_test_hs, y = ymean)

ggplot( ) + geom_point(data = points, aes(x = x, y = y)) + geom_line(data = lines_pred_hs, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "red") + geom_ribbon(aes(x = x_test_hs, ymin = qtls_pred_hs[1, ], ymax = qtls_pred_hs[2, ]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
```
# NO HS unconstrained
```{r}
x <- data_no_hs$mom_iq
y <- data_no_hs$kid_score
x_test <- append(seq(0, 0.45, by = 0.05), append(x, seq(0.8, 1, by = 0.05)))
model_no_hs_u <- create(
  class = "lineqGP",
  x = x,
  y = y,
  constrType = c("boundedness"),
  m = 30
)
model_no_hs_u$bounds <- c(-10,10)
model_no_hs_u$varnoise <- 1e-2

sim.model_no_hs_u <- simulate(model_no_hs_u,
                            xtest = x_test,
                            nsim = 1e2,
                            seed = 1)
beep()

ysim <- sim.model_no_hs_u$ysim
qtls_pred_no_hs_u <- apply(ysim, 1, quantile, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))

points <- data.frame(x = (x), y = (y))
ymean = apply(ysim, 1, mean)
lines_pred_no_hs_u <- data.frame(x = x_test, y = ymean)

ggplot() + geom_point(data = points, aes(x = x, y = y)) + geom_line(data = lines_pred_no_hs_u, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "red") + geom_ribbon(aes(x = x_test, ymin = qtls_pred_no_hs_u[1, ], ymax = qtls_pred_no_hs_u[2, ]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
```

# HS unconstrained
```{r}
x <- data_hs$mom_iq
y <- data_hs$kid_score
x_test <- append(seq(0, 0.40, by = 0.05),append(x, seq(0.8, 1, by = 0.05)))
model_hs_u <- create(
  class = "lineqGP",
  x = x,
  y = y,
  constrType = c("boundedness"),
  m = 30
)
model_hs_u$bounds <- c(-10,10)
model_hs_u$varnoise <- 1e-2

sim.model_hs_u <- simulate(model_hs_u,
                            xtest = x_test,
                            nsim = 1e2,
                            seed = 1)
beep()

ysim <- sim.model_hs_u$ysim
qtls_pred_hs_u <- apply(ysim, 1, quantile, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))

points <- data.frame(x = (x), y = (y))
ymean = apply(ysim, 1, mean)
lines_pred_hs_u <- data.frame(x = x_test, y = ymean)

ggplot() + geom_point(data = points, aes(x = x, y = y)) + geom_line(data = lines_pred_hs_u, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "red") + geom_ribbon(aes(x = x_test, ymin = qtls_pred_hs_u[1, ], ymax = qtls_pred_hs_u[2, ]), fill = "gray60", alpha = 0.4)
```

```{r}
points <- geom_point(data = data, aes(x = (mom_iq), y = (kid_score), color = factor(mom_hs)))

line_hs<- geom_line(data = lines_pred_hs, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "darkslategray4", linewidth = 1)

line_no_hs <- geom_line(data = lines_pred_no_hs, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "indianred3", linewidth = 1)

line_hs_u<- geom_line(data = lines_pred_hs_u, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "darkseagreen4", linewidth = 1)

line_no_hs_u <- geom_line(data = lines_pred_no_hs_u, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "orange4", linewidth = 1)

ci_hs <- geom_ribbon(aes(x = x_test_hs, ymin = qtls_pred_hs[1, ], ymax = qtls_pred_hs[2, ]), fill = "lightskyblue", alpha = 0.4)
  
ci_no_hs <- geom_ribbon(aes(x = x_test_no_hs, ymin = qtls_pred_no_hs[1, ], ymax = qtls_pred_no_hs[2, ]), fill = "mistyrose2", alpha = 0.4)

ci_hs_u <- geom_ribbon(aes(x = x_test_hs, ymin = qtls_pred_hs_u[1, ], ymax = qtls_pred_hs_u[2, ]), fill = "palegreen2", alpha = 0.3)
  
ci_no_hs_u <- geom_ribbon(aes(x = x_test_no_hs, ymin = qtls_pred_no_hs_u[1, ], ymax = qtls_pred_no_hs_u[2, ]), fill = "lightyellow2", alpha = 0.3)

p1 <- ggplot()  + points + ci_hs + ci_no_hs + line_hs + line_no_hs 
p1

p2 <- ggplot()  + points  + ci_hs_u + ci_no_hs_u + line_hs_u + line_no_hs_u
p2


p3 <- ggplot()  + geom_point(data = data_hs, aes(x = (mom_iq), y = (kid_score)), color = "darkslategray3")  + ci_hs + ci_hs_u + line_hs + line_hs_u
p3

p4 <- ggplot()  + geom_point(data = data_no_hs, aes(x = (mom_iq), y = (kid_score)), color = "indianred2")  + ci_no_hs + ci_no_hs_u + line_no_hs + line_no_hs_u
p4

ggsave("pred_no_hs.png", p4, width = 10, height = 6,dpi = 180)
```



```{r}
# TODO compare models
```

## LGPR to induce group-based ANOVA

```{r}
require("lgpr")

idx <- sample(data_hs$datapoint, 135, replace=FALSE)

data_shorter <- data[-c(idx),] 

m_1 <- lgp(
  kid_score ~
    gp(mom_iq) +  zs(mom_hs),
  data = data_shorter,
  sample_f = TRUE
)

summary(m_1)

print(m_1)
save(m_1, file="m_1.RData")
load("m_1.RData")
```
```{r}
# Define time sequence
t <- append(append(seq(0, 0.4, by = 0.05), data_shorter$mom_iq), seq(0.9, 1, by = 0.05))

# Generate prediction dataset
x_pred <- lgpr::new_x(data_shorter, t, group_by = "mom_hs", x = "mom_iq")
#x_pred <- lgpr::new_x(data_shorter, t, group_by = NA, x = "mom_iq")


process_predictions <- function(predicted) {
  # Extract and reshape predictions 
  x <- as.data.frame(predicted@x)
  y <- as.data.frame(predicted@h) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = everything()) %>%
    dplyr::select(-name) #%>%   rename(y = value)

  # Combine 
  data <- cbind(x, y)
  
  return(data)
}


# Apply function for predictions for shared effect (f = fixed effect) and person-specific effect (r = random effects)
pred1 <-lgpr::pred(m_1, x_pred,  verbose = FALSE)
gp_pred_f <- process_predictions(pred1)
pred2<- lgpr::pred(m_1, verbose = FALSE)
gp_pred_r <- process_predictions(pred2)
```

```{r}
ggplot(gp_pred_f, aes(x = mom_iq, y = value )) + 
  geom_smooth(color = project_colors[2], size = 1) +  
  geom_point(aes(y = value), color = project_colors[3], alpha = 0.7, size = 1.2)
```

```{r}
ggplot(gp_pred_r, aes(x = mom_iq, y = value )) + 
  geom_smooth(color = project_colors[2], size = 1) +  
  geom_point(aes(y = value), color = project_colors[3], alpha = 0.7, size = 1.2)
```
```{r}
# Extract posterior samples from fit
posterior_samples <- pred(m_1)

# Sort time points (months) for consistent plotting
order <- order(data_shorter$mom_iq)
mom_iqs <- data_shorter$mom_iq[order]
posterior_samples <- posterior_samples@f_comp$`gp(mom_iq)`[, order]

# Convert to tidy format for summarising
df_draws <- as_tibble(posterior_samples)
colnames(df_draws) <- as.character(seq_along(colnames(df_draws)))

# Reshape to long format
df_draws <- df_draws %>%
  mutate(draw = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -draw,
    names_to = "iq_index",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    iq_index = as.integer(iq_index),
    iq = mom_iqs[iq_index]
  )

# Randomly select 1,000 posterior draws
set.seed(123)  # for reproducibility
draw_ids <- sample(unique(df_draws$draw), 1000)

# Filter the data to keep only the selected draws
df_draws_sampled <- df_draws %>%
  filter(draw %in% draw_ids)

# Get original mean and SD of life satisfaction,
# to denormalise predictions back to the original scale of life satisfaction
#mean_ls <- mean(wido$lifesatisfaction)
#sd_ls <- sd(wido$lifesatisfaction)


# Compute 95% credible intervals per month
summary_df <- df_draws_sampled %>%
  group_by(iq) %>%
  summarise(
    lower_CI = quantile(value, 0.025),
    upper_CI = quantile(value, 0.975),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
#%>%
 # mutate(lower_CI = lower_CI * sd_ls + mean_ls,
  #       upper_CI = upper_CI * sd_ls + mean_ls
  #)

# not working
```
```{r}
#plot_base + 
ggplot()+
  geom_line(data = gp_pred_r, aes(mom_iq, value, group = mom_hs,  color = factor(mom_hs)),, linewidth = 0.6) +
#  geom_ribbon(data = summary_df, aes(ymin = lower_CI, ymax = upper_CI, x = month),
        #      alpha = 0.2, fill = "firebrick4") +
 # geom_line(data = gp_pred_f, aes(x = mom_iq, y = value),  color = "firebrick4", linewidth = 0.6) +
  ggtitle("Gaussian Process Regression") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"))
```
```{r}
# Because we want to compare our predicted average trajectory, with the actual average trajectory, we need to merge the predicted dataframe with the original data
gp_pred_f <- gp_pred_f %>%
  dplyr::select(mom_iq, value)
gp_pred_f <- merge(data_shorter, gp_pred_f, key = "mom_iq")

# Now we can calculate R², MAE, and RMSE for the fixed effects predictions
data.frame(
  R2_FE = round(R2(gp_pred_f$value, gp_pred_f$m_lifesat_per_mnth), 2),
  MAE_FE = round(MAE(gp_pred_f$value, gp_pred_f$m_lifesat_per_mnth), 2),
  RMSE_FE = round(RMSE(gp_pred_f$value, gp_pred_f$m_lifesat_per_mnth), 2)
)

# TODO m_lifesat_per_mnth

  # test_data <- test_data %>%
  #   group_by(mnths) %>%
  #   mutate(m_lifesat_per_mnth = mean(lifesatisfaction, na.rm = TRUE))
  

# Calculate R², MAE, and RMSE for the random effects predictions
data.frame(
  R2_RE = round(R2(gp_pred_r$value, gp_pred_r$kid_score), 2),
  MAE_RE = round(MAE(gp_pred_r$value, gp_pred_r$kid_score), 2),
  RMSE_RE = round(RMSE(gp_pred_r$value, gp_pred_r$kid_score), 2)
)
```

```{r}

# ── Assumes m_1 is already fitted with sample_f = TRUE ───────────────────────
# m_1 <- lgp(kid_score ~ gp(mom_iq) + zs(mom_hs), data = data_shorter,
#             sample_f = TRUE)

# ── 0. Factor ordering ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Ensure "no hs" < "hs" so the zero-sum offset is negative for the lower group
# data_shorter <- data_shorter |>
#   mutate(mom_hs = factor(mom_hs, levels = c("no hs", "hs")))  # adjust strings if needed

# ── 1. Recover the y scaling from the fit object ──────────────────────────────
# lgpr always normalises kid_score internally (zero mean, unit SD).
# pred() with sample_f = TRUE returns draws on that internal scale.
# We back-transform manually: y_original = y_normalised * sd + mean

y_mean <- mean(data_shorter$kid_score)
y_sd   <- sd(data_shorter$kid_score)

unscale <- function(x) x  + y_mean#* y_sd + y_mean

# ── 2. Prediction grids ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
iq_grid <- seq(min(data_shorter$mom_iq), max(data_shorter$mom_iq), length.out = 120)

x_hs <- data.frame(
  mom_iq = iq_grid,
  mom_hs = factor(1,    levels = levels(data_shorter$mom_hs))
)
x_nohs <- data.frame(
  mom_iq = iq_grid,
  mom_hs = factor(0, levels = levels(data_shorter$mom_hs))
)
x_shared <- x_hs   # group label irrelevant for gp(mom_iq)

# ── 3. Run pred() with reduce = NULL ─────────────────────────────────────────
# With sample_f = TRUE and an x supplied, pred() extrapolates the f draws to
# the new grid via kernel regression.  The default reduce = mean collapses all
# draws into one before extrapolation, leaving a single vector (lo = hi, wrong
# scale).  reduce = NULL keeps every draw → a proper [S × P] draw matrix.
n_draws <- nrow(get_draws(m_1))   # total posterior draws
idx     <- sample(n_draws, min(200, n_draws))
 
pred_hs    <- pred(m_1, x = x_hs,     draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)
pred_nohs  <- pred(m_1, x = x_nohs,   draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)
pred_share <- pred(m_1, x = x_shared, draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)
# ── 4. Extract and unscale ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Prediction object slots (sample_f = TRUE path):
#   @f_comp  – list of length J, each element is a [S × P] draw matrix
#              [[ 1 ]] = gp(mom_iq)   [[ 2 ]] = zs(mom_hs)
#   @f       – [S × P] matrix of total signal draws (sum of all components)

# Helper: summarise a draw matrix [S × P] → posterior mean + 95% CI
draws_summary <- function(mat, iq_grid, group = NULL) {
  mat <- unscale(mat)
  df <- tibble(
    mom_iq = iq_grid,
    mean   = colMeans(mat),
    lo     = apply(mat, 2, quantile, 0.025),
    hi     = apply(mat, 2, quantile, 0.975)
  )
  if (!is.null(group)) df$mom_hs <- group
  df
}

# Shared trend = component 1 = gp(mom_iq)
df_shared <- draws_summary(pred_share@f_comp[[1]], iq_grid)

# Group totals = @f  (comp1 + comp2)
df_hs    <- draws_summary(pred_hs@f,   iq_grid, group = 1)
df_nohs  <- draws_summary(pred_nohs@f, iq_grid, group = 0)

df_groups <- bind_rows(df_hs, df_nohs) |>
  mutate(mom_hs = factor(mom_hs, levels = c(0, 1)))

# ── 5. Plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#pal_groups <- c(0 = "grey65", 1 = "grey20")

p_m_1<- ggplot() +
  # 95% CI ribbons for group curves
  geom_ribbon(
    data = df_groups,
    aes(x = mom_iq, ymin = lo, ymax = hi, fill = mom_hs),
    alpha = 0.18
  ) +
  # Group-specific total curves: f = gp(mom_iq) + zs(mom_hs)
  geom_line(
    data = df_groups,
    aes(x = mom_iq, y = mean, colour = mom_hs, group = mom_hs),
    linewidth = 0.85
  ) +
  # Shared trend: gp(mom_iq) only — dashed red
  geom_line(
    data      = df_shared,
    aes(x = mom_iq, y = mean),
    colour    = "firebrick4",
    linewidth = 0.9,
    linetype  = "dashed"
  ) +
  # Raw data
  geom_point(
    data  = data_shorter,
    aes(x = mom_iq, y = kid_score, colour = mom_hs),
    alpha = 0.4, size = 1.4
  ) +
 # scale_colour_manual(values = pal_groups, name = "Mother HS") +
  #scale_fill_manual(values   = pal_groups, name = "Mother HS") +
  labs(
    x        = "Mother's IQ",
    y        = "Child IQ score",
    title    = "Functional ANOVA GP decomposition",
    subtitle = "Dashed red = shared gp(mom_iq); lines = group totals [shared + zs offset]; ribbon = 95% CI"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
p_m_1
ggsave("lgpr_ANOVA_m_1.png", p_m_1, width = 10, height = 6,dpi = 180)
```
```{r}
t <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.01)
x_pred <- new_x(data_shorter, t, x = "mom_iq", group_by = "mom_hs")

p <- pred(m_1, x_pred, reduce = mean)

plot_components(m_1,
  pred = p,
  group_by = "mom_hs",
  t_name  = "mom_iq",
  color_by = c("mom_hs", "mom_hs", "mom_hs"),
#  ylim = c(-0.5, 1),
  ncol = 2
)

plot_components(m_1,
  group_by = "mom_hs",
  t_name  = "mom_iq",
  color_by = c("mom_hs", "mom_hs", "mom_hs"),
#  ylim = c(-0.5, 1),
  ncol = 2
)

# no_err??
```

```{r}

# --- Extract posterior draws ---
post_mat <- get_draws(m_1)                         # num_draws x num_params matrix
post     <- post_mat[, grepl("^alpha|^ell|^sigma", colnames(post_mat)), drop = FALSE]
post     <- as.data.frame(post)

n <- nrow(post)

# --- Prior draws (defaults: alpha ~ half-t(20), ell ~ log-normal(0,1), sigma^2 ~ inv-gamma(2,1)) ---
prior_df <- data.frame(
  `alpha[1]` = abs(rt(n, df = 20)),
  `alpha[2]` = abs(rt(n, df = 20)),
  `ell[1]`   = rlnorm(n, 0, 1),
  `ell[2]`   = rlnorm(n, 0, 1),
  `sigma[1]` = sqrt(1 / rgamma(n, shape = 2, rate = 1)),
  check.names = FALSE
)

# --- Combine and tidy ---
post_long  <- post  |> mutate(src = "posterior") |> pivot_longer(-src)
prior_long <- prior_df |> mutate(src = "prior")   |> pivot_longer(-src)

df <- bind_rows(post_long, prior_long) |>
  mutate(
    src  = factor(src, levels = c("prior", "posterior")),
    name = recode(name,
      `alpha[1]` = "a[1]",
      `alpha[2]` = "a[2]",
      `ell[1]`   = "l[1]",
      `ell[2]`   = "l[2]",
      `sigma[1]` = "σ"
    )
  )

# Trim extreme prior tails for readability
df <- df |>
  group_by(name) |>
  mutate(value = pmin(value, quantile(value[src == "prior"], 0.995))) |>
  ungroup()

param_plot<- ggplot(df, aes(x = value, fill = src, colour = src)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free", labeller = label_parsed) +
  scale_fill_manual(values   = c(prior = "steelblue", posterior = "firebrick4")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(prior = "steelblue", posterior = "firebrick4")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Density", fill = NULL, colour = NULL,
       title = "Prior vs posterior distributions") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
param_plot
ggsave("param_plot_lgpr_ANOVA_m_1.png", param_plot, width = 10, height = 6,dpi = 180)
```
## LGPR with informative priors
```{r}

# priors
prior <- list(
  alpha = igam(2, 1, square = TRUE),# log_normal(0, 1), 
  ell = igam(2, 1, square = FALSE)
)

idx <- sample(data_hs$datapoint, 135, replace=FALSE)

data_shorter <- data[-c(idx),] 

m_2 <- lgp(
  kid_score ~
    gp(mom_iq) +  zs(mom_hs),
  data = data_shorter,
  prior = prior,
  sample_f = TRUE
)

print(m_2)
save(m_2, file="m_2.RData")
#load("m_2.RData")
```
```{r}

y_mean <- mean(data_shorter$kid_score)
y_sd   <- sd(data_shorter$kid_score)

unscale <- function(x) x  + y_mean 

iq_grid <- seq(min(data_shorter$mom_iq), max(data_shorter$mom_iq), length.out = 120)

x_hs <- data.frame(
  mom_iq = iq_grid,
  mom_hs = factor(1,    levels = levels(data_shorter$mom_hs))
)
x_nohs <- data.frame(
  mom_iq = iq_grid,
  mom_hs = factor(0, levels = levels(data_shorter$mom_hs))
)
x_shared <- x_hs   

n_draws <- nrow(get_draws(m_2))  
idx     <- sample(n_draws, min(200, n_draws))
 
pred_hs    <- pred(m_2, x = x_hs,     draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)
pred_nohs  <- pred(m_2, x = x_nohs,   draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)
pred_share <- pred(m_2, x = x_shared, draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)

draws_summary <- function(mat, iq_grid, group = NULL) {
  mat <- unscale(mat)
  df <- tibble(
    mom_iq = iq_grid,
    mean   = colMeans(mat),
    lo     = apply(mat, 2, quantile, 0.025),
    hi     = apply(mat, 2, quantile, 0.975)
  )
  if (!is.null(group)) df$mom_hs <- group
  df
}

df_shared <- draws_summary(pred_share@f_comp[[1]], iq_grid)


df_hs    <- draws_summary(pred_hs@f,   iq_grid, group = 1)
df_nohs  <- draws_summary(pred_nohs@f, iq_grid, group = 0)

df_groups <- bind_rows(df_hs, df_nohs) |>
  mutate(mom_hs = factor(mom_hs, levels = c(0, 1)))


p_m_2<- ggplot() +
  # 95% CI ribbons for group curves
  geom_ribbon(
    data = df_groups,
    aes(x = mom_iq, ymin = lo, ymax = hi, fill = mom_hs),
    alpha = 0.18
  ) +
  # Group-specific total curves: f = gp(mom_iq) + zs(mom_hs)
  geom_line(
    data = df_groups,
    aes(x = mom_iq, y = mean, colour = mom_hs, group = mom_hs),
    linewidth = 0.85
  ) +
  # Shared trend: gp(mom_iq) only — dashed red
  geom_line(
    data      = df_shared,
    aes(x = mom_iq, y = mean),
    colour    = "firebrick4",
    linewidth = 0.9,
    linetype  = "dashed"
  ) +
  # Raw data
  geom_point(
    data  = data_shorter,
    aes(x = mom_iq, y = kid_score, colour = mom_hs),
    alpha = 0.4, size = 1.4
  ) +
 # scale_colour_manual(values = pal_groups, name = "Mother HS") +
  #scale_fill_manual(values   = pal_groups, name = "Mother HS") +
  labs(
    x        = "Mother's IQ",
    y        = "Child IQ score",
    title    = "Functional ANOVA GP decomposition",
    subtitle = "Dashed red = shared gp(mom_iq); lines = group totals [shared + zs offset]; ribbon = 95% CI"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
p_m_2
ggsave("lgpr_ANOVA_m_2.png", p_m_2, width = 10, height = 6,dpi = 180)


# --- Extract posterior draws ---
post_mat <- get_draws(m_2)                         # num_draws x num_params matrix
post     <- post_mat[, grepl("^alpha|^ell|^sigma", colnames(post_mat)), drop = FALSE]
post     <- as.data.frame(post)

n <- nrow(post)

# --- Prior draws (defaults: alpha ~ half-t(20), ell ~ log-normal(0,1), sigma^2 ~ inv-gamma(2,1)) ---
prior_df <- data.frame(
  `alpha[1]` = abs(rt(n, df = 20)),
  `alpha[2]` = abs(rt(n, df = 20)),
  `ell[1]`   = rlnorm(n, 0, 1),
  `ell[2]`   = rlnorm(n, 0, 1),
  `sigma[1]` = sqrt(1 / rgamma(n, shape = 2, rate = 1)),
  check.names = FALSE
)

# --- Combine and tidy ---
post_long  <- post  |> mutate(src = "posterior") |> pivot_longer(-src)
prior_long <- prior_df |> mutate(src = "prior")   |> pivot_longer(-src)

df <- bind_rows(post_long, prior_long) |>
  mutate(
    src  = factor(src, levels = c("prior", "posterior")),
    name = recode(name,
      `alpha[1]` = "a[1]",
      `alpha[2]` = "a[2]",
      `ell[1]`   = "l[1]",
      `ell[2]`   = "l[2]",
      `sigma[1]` = "σ"
    )
  )

# Trim extreme prior tails for readability
df <- df |>
  group_by(name) |>
  mutate(value = pmin(value, quantile(value[src == "prior"], 0.995))) |>
  ungroup()

param_plot<- ggplot(df, aes(x = value, fill = src, colour = src)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free", labeller = label_parsed) +
  scale_fill_manual(values   = c(prior = "steelblue", posterior = "firebrick4")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(prior = "steelblue", posterior = "firebrick4")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Density", fill = NULL, colour = NULL,
       title = "Prior vs posterior distributions") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

param_plot
ggsave("param_plot_lgpr_ANOVA_m_2.png", param_plot, width = 10, height = 6,dpi = 180)
```

## LGPR with a more complicated model
```{r}
set.seed(123)
# priors
prior <- list(
  alpha = igam(2, 1, square = TRUE),# log_normal(0, 1), 
  ell = igam(2, 1, square = FALSE)
)

idx <- sample(data_hs$datapoint, 135, replace=FALSE)

data_shorter <- data[-c(idx),] 

# Fit model
m_3 <- lgp(
  kid_score ~
    gp(mom_iq) +  gp(mom_iq)*zs(mom_hs),
  data = data_shorter,
 # prior = prior,
  sample_f = FALSE
)

print(m_3)
save(m_3, file="m_3.RData")
#load("m_3.RData")
```
```{r}

y_mean <- mean(data_shorter$kid_score)
y_sd   <- sd(data_shorter$kid_score)

unscale <- function(x) x  + y_mean 

iq_grid <- seq(min(data_shorter$mom_iq), max(data_shorter$mom_iq), length.out = 120)

x_hs <- data.frame(
  mom_iq = iq_grid,
  mom_hs = factor(1,    levels = levels(data_shorter$mom_hs))
)
x_nohs <- data.frame(
  mom_iq = iq_grid,
  mom_hs = factor(0, levels = levels(data_shorter$mom_hs))
)
x_shared <- x_hs   

n_draws <- nrow(get_draws(m_3))  
idx     <- sample(n_draws, min(200, n_draws))
 
pred_hs    <- pred(m_3, x = x_hs,     draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)
pred_nohs  <- pred(m_3, x = x_nohs,   draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)
pred_share <- pred(m_3, x = x_shared, draws = idx, verbose = FALSE)

draws_summary <- function(mat, iq_grid, group = NULL) {
#  mat <- unscale(mat)
  df <- tibble(
    mom_iq = iq_grid,
    mean   = colMeans(mat),
    lo     = apply(mat, 2, quantile, 0.025),
    hi     = apply(mat, 2, quantile, 0.975)
  )
  if (!is.null(group)) df$mom_hs <- group
  df
}

df_shared <- draws_summary(pred_share@f_comp_mean[[1]], iq_grid)


df_hs    <- draws_summary(pred_hs@f_mean,   iq_grid, group = 1)
df_nohs  <- draws_summary(pred_nohs@f_mean, iq_grid, group = 0)

df_groups <- bind_rows(df_hs, df_nohs) |>
  mutate(mom_hs = factor(mom_hs, levels = c(0, 1)))


p_m_3<- ggplot() +
  # 95% CI ribbons for group curves
  geom_ribbon(
    data = df_groups,
    aes(x = mom_iq, ymin = lo, ymax = hi, fill = mom_hs),
    alpha = 0.18
  ) +
  # Group-specific total curves: f = gp(mom_iq) + zs(mom_hs)
  geom_line(
    data = df_groups,
    aes(x = mom_iq, y = mean, colour = mom_hs, group = mom_hs),
    linewidth = 0.85
  ) +
  # Shared trend: gp(mom_iq) only — dashed red
  geom_line(
    data      = df_shared,
    aes(x = mom_iq, y = mean),
    colour    = "firebrick4",
    linewidth = 0.9,
    linetype  = "dashed"
  ) +
  # Raw data
  geom_point(
    data  = data_shorter,
    aes(x = mom_iq, y = kid_score, colour = mom_hs),
    alpha = 0.4, size = 1.4
  ) +
 # scale_colour_manual(values = pal_groups, name = "Mother HS") +
  #scale_fill_manual(values   = pal_groups, name = "Mother HS") +
  labs(
    x        = "Mother's IQ",
    y        = "Child IQ score",
    title    = "Functional ANOVA GP decomposition",
    subtitle = "Dashed red = shared gp(mom_iq); lines = group totals [shared + zs offset]; ribbon = 95% CI"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
p_m_3
ggsave("lgpr_ANOVA_m_3.png", p_m_3, width = 10, height = 6,dpi = 180)


# --- Extract posterior draws ---
post_mat <- get_draws(m_3)                         # num_draws x num_params matrix
post     <- post_mat[, grepl("^alpha|^ell|^sigma", colnames(post_mat)), drop = FALSE]
post     <- as.data.frame(post)

n <- nrow(post)

# --- Prior draws (defaults: alpha ~ half-t(20), ell ~ log-normal(0,1), sigma^2 ~ inv-gamma(2,1)) ---
prior_df <- data.frame(
  `alpha[1]` = abs(rt(n, df = 20)),
  `alpha[2]` = abs(rt(n, df = 20)),
  `ell[1]`   = rlnorm(n, 0, 1),
  `ell[2]`   = rlnorm(n, 0, 1),
  `sigma[1]` = sqrt(1 / rgamma(n, shape = 2, rate = 1)),
  check.names = FALSE
)

# --- Combine and tidy ---
post_long  <- post  |> mutate(src = "posterior") |> pivot_longer(-src)
prior_long <- prior_df |> mutate(src = "prior")   |> pivot_longer(-src)

df <- bind_rows(post_long, prior_long) |>
  mutate(
    src  = factor(src, levels = c("prior", "posterior")),
    name = recode(name,
      `alpha[1]` = "a[1]",
      `alpha[2]` = "a[2]",
      `ell[1]`   = "l[1]",
      `ell[2]`   = "l[2]",
      `sigma[1]` = "σ"
    )
  )

# Trim extreme prior tails for readability
df <- df |>
  group_by(name) |>
  mutate(value = pmin(value, quantile(value[src == "prior"], 0.995))) |>
  ungroup()

param_plot<- ggplot(df, aes(x = value, fill = src, colour = src)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4, linewidth = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free", labeller = label_parsed) +
  scale_fill_manual(values   = c(prior = "steelblue", posterior = "firebrick4")) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(prior = "steelblue", posterior = "firebrick4")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Density", fill = NULL, colour = NULL,
       title = "Prior vs posterior distributions") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

param_plot
ggsave("param_plot_lgpr_ANOVA_m_3.png", param_plot, width = 10, height = 6,dpi = 180)
```

```{r}
t <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.01)
x_pred <- new_x(data_shorter, t, x = "mom_iq", group_by = "mom_hs")

p <- pred(m_3, x_pred, reduce = mean)

plot_components(m_3,
  pred = p,
  group_by = "mom_hs",
  t_name  = "mom_iq",
  color_by = c("mom_hs", "mom_hs", "mom_hs"),
#  ylim = c(-0.5, 1),
  ncol = 2
)

plot_components(m_3,
  group_by = "mom_hs",
  t_name  = "mom_iq",
  color_by = c("mom_hs", "mom_hs", "mom_hs"),
#  ylim = c(-0.5, 1),
  ncol = 2
)
```
